arts.sum: Third top hosts third bottom in the Scottish Premiership, as Aberdeen and Ross County go head-to-head at Pittodrie to kick off 2025. The Dons' rancid recent record against newly-promoted opposition c...

arts.ttl: Connor Barron compensation fee from Rangers revealed as Aberdeen left disappointed
arts.sum: The Gers have now learned just how much they owe the Dons for the midfielder's services
